conventions.sensor: DECODED DNG mosaic (post-DefaultCrop) — what every kernel receives; device-verified 2026-07-17 c386663; pre-crop tile raster is rasterPreCrop, decoder-internal only
conventions.crop: canonical side = largest 256*2^j <= min(w,h), capped at canonicalSide; null when min(w,h) < 256; origin = ((dim-side) div 2) & ~1 (even snap preserves CFA phase)
conventions.cropCases: replayed verbatim by the Swift harness against BorealKernels.canonicalSide/cropOrigin
